headline: Kirkwood Pulse • June 18, 2026
overview: Debrecht Properties and CORE10 Architects propose rezoning twelve parcels at Sarah Avenue and North Kirkwood Road to build 38 condos, aiming to increase housing density and improve walkability near key amenities. This project could revitalize a stalled area by replacing restrictive B-3 zoning with multifamily housing, supporting local growth and transit acc…

items.title: 38 New Condos Proposed For N. Kirkwood Rd
items.excerpt: Thirteen years ago, an ambitious plan to turn the intersection of Manchester and Kirkwood Road into a second walkable downtown fizzled, leaving behind an auto-oriented CVS and a Fresh Thyme grocery store. Now that long-stalled neighborhood may be getting a second chance. Debrecht Properties and their partners, CORE10 Architects, will go before the Planning & Zoning Committee tonight, Wednesday, June
